TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Qnragan, title = Qnragan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qnragan} }

S.FORM: Qnragan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Qnragan a niyaro', 67 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 179 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 69% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 123 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 31% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku59%, Amis3%, Tayal4%, Paiwan2%, roma1%.
S.PHON: *nra*an itiniaj i xio~u~u…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u *nra*an a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u**%, amis*%, taja…ĺ*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Qnragan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Qnragan a niyaro', 67 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 179 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 69% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 123 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 31% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 56 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku59%, Amis3%, Tayal4%, Paiwan2%, roma1%.
S.PHON: *nra*an itiniaj i xio~u~u…ĺin ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u *nra*an a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u**%, amis*%, taja…ĺ*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%.
